turns.text: Hi, this is an AI assistant calling on behalf of Medx, the senior-living placement service. Is this a good time to chat for two minutes?
Hmm, kind of. Who am I talking to?
I'm an AI assistant from Medx, the senior-living placement service. Are you involved in placement decisions at Sunset Ridge?
I sometimes help with things around here. Not sure if I'm the right person.
